todos.content: Inspect backend implementation in [`server/index.js`](server/index.js:1) for OAuth, session gating, avatar storage, secret handling, CORS, rate limiting, and Railway readiness
Inspect frontend implementation in [`src/App.tsx`](src/App.tsx:1), [`src/api.ts`](src/api.ts:1), and release content in [`src/data/changelog.ts`](src/data/changelog.ts:1)
Produce a production-readiness gap analysis and final implementation plan
Save the approved architecture and execution plan in [`.tocodex/plans/`](.tocodex/plans/)
Switch to 💻 Code mode to implement and validate the required fixes
After implementation, prepare Railway environment variable checklist and GitHub push steps
